name: Madara
description: A mysterious feline spirit. Madara was sealed in a shrine until he was accidentally released by Natsume. Because Madara was trapped in a material form for so long, Madara ordinary takes on the shape of a maneki neko (lucky cat), leading Natsume to nickname him Nyanko-sensei. In this form, other people can see him, leading for Natsume having to ask his guardians if he could keep him as a pet. Madara is a powerful spirit, who protects Natsume from others and teaches him spells on occasion, in retu

name: Kenya Kobayashi
description: Kenya is one of Satoru's primary school classmates. He has a strong sense of justice and has a sharp eye for abnormalities. ~!He becomes a lawyer in the future.!~

name: Baku Madarame
description: Baku is known as a genius gambler, he is a legend in the underworld. During gambles, there are many instances where he intimidates and tosses around his opponents as if he is eating them. And even outside of gambling, he is prone to danger and likes to take risks in everything. His true feelings towards people are unknown and a mystery. name: Wendy Marvell
description: Wendy is the sky dragon slayer. She has the ability to heal and manipulate air.

name: Shion
description: __Race:__ Human __Tao Attribute:__ Wood Shion is the 4th rank Asaemon of the Yamada clan and is the one chosen to be Akaginu's monitor. Shion is a strict but kind man. He is well aware of the brutal nature of his work as an executioner, opting to spend the rest of his time helping others. Like the other Asaemon, he possesses a strong loyalty to the Yamada clan. name: Hakkekkyuu U-1146
description: He is a White Blood Cell, specifically a Neutrophil, working under the Neutrophil Division. Along with the other neutrophil comrades, he's tasked to patrol around the Blood Vessel and remove any invading Foreign Substances such as Germs and Viruses. (Source: Cells at Work Wikia)

name: Kofuku Ebisu
description: Originally introduced as [Yato's](https://anilist.co/character/84677/Yato) girlfriend that he frequently shakes down for money, Kofuku is later revealed to be the infamous Binbougami - a Japanese Goddess of Poverty. She goes by the cover name "Kofuku Ebisu" in order to make it seem as though she is a god of fortune. She has a Shinki named [Daikoku](https://anilist.co/character/88691/Daikoku).

name: Yoshiko Tsushima
description: __Height:__ 156 cm A first-year student who consistently has bad luck, so she thinks of herself as a fallen angel, although she is very proud of this fact. She insists on being called "Yohane" instead of her real name, Yoshiko.

name: Sousuke Shima
description: Mitsumi's classmate who is popular with girls. He is known for sabotaging the entrance ceremony and skipping classes. Though he planned to skip the entrance ceremony, he meets Mitsumi and they run to school together.

name: Akari Kawamoto
description: Akari is the eldest of three Kawamoto sisters. After her mother and grandmother’s death, she stepped in as the parent figure for her younger sisters. In the mornings she helps her elderly grandfather run a traditional wagashi shop, and in the evenings she works as a hostess at a bar, which her aunt manages.

name: Bulma
description: __Birth Year:__ 733 Age __Height:__ 165 cm (5'5") __Race:__ Earthling Bulma is originally a secondary main character, but her role is quickly downplayed as the series continues, even though she does remain an important support character for most of the series. Bulma is a direct parody of the character Xuanzang from the Chinese novel Journey to the West. description: Shion is Mion's identical twin sister, who currently resides in Okinomiya. name: Ging Freecss
description: __Height:__ 176 cm (5'9") A famous 2-star ancient ruins hunter and the father of Gon Freeccs. When Ging was a child, he left his home on Whale Island to become a hunter and did not return home for 10 years, carrying a young Gon whom he entrusted to Mito. He is the primary reason Gon decides to leave home, following in his footsteps to become a hunter and find his father. ~!He is one of the founders of the legendary video game Greed Island.!~ ~!He is also a member of the Zodiacs, having as a sign

name: Kiki
description: A thirteen-year-old apprentice witch, leaving her home village to spend a year on her own. She has no visible magical abilities other than communicating with her cat and broom-flying (at which she is still a novice). She is excitable, innocent, and by turns eager and shy. Some of the earlier concept drawings of Kiki closely resembled the original longer hair illustrations by Akiko Hayashi. It was eventually decided to cut her hair short due to the extra difficulty for animators.

name: Koutarou Tatsumi
description: He is the energetic producer of the idol group Franchouchou. He's the one who resurrected the girls from different eras as zombies to be part of his idol group. ~!He seems to have known Sakura in high school!~

name: Sensou no Akuma
description: Yoru is the War Devil and a member of the Four Horsemen, who now occupies [Asa Mitaka](https://anilist.co/character/282389/Asa-Mitaka). Before inhabiting Asa's body, her appearance was that of a bird, largely resembling a potoo. Yoru is first seen on top of a traffic light a few seconds prior to Asa Mitaka's death by the [Class President](https://anilist.co/character/282391/Gakkyuu-Iinchou)'s Justice Devil Form. name: Tomodachi

name: Charmy Pappitson

description: __Height:__ 142 cm Member of the Black Bull squad. She is an extremely big eater and tougher than she looks. When someone threatens to steal her meals, she becomes cold and merciless.
